label: hits.name
labelDescription: Name of the target (sequence for phmmer/hmmsearch, HMM for hmmscan).

label: hits.score
labelDescription: Bit score of the sequence (all domains, without correction)

label: hits.nenvelopes
labelDescription: Number of envelopes handed over for domain definition, null2, alignment, and scoring.

label: hits.ndom
labelDescription: Total number of domains identified in this sequence.

label: hits.nreported
labelDescription: Number of domains satisfying reporting thresholding.

label: hits.nincluded
labelDescription: Number of domains satisfying inclusion thresholding.

label: hits.taxid
labelDescription: The NCBI taxonomy identifier of the target (if applicable).

label: hits.species
labelDescription: The species name of the target (if applicable).

label: hits.kg
labelDescription: The kingdom of life that the target belongs to - based on placing in the NCBI taxonomy tree (if applicable).

label: domains.bitscore
labelDescription: Overall score in bits, null corrected, if this were the only domain in seq.

label: domains.cevalue
labelDescription: Conditional E-value based on the domain correction.

label: domains.ievalue
labelDescription: Independent E-value based on the domain correction.

label: domains.alimodel
labelDescription: Aligned query consensus sequence phmmer and hmmsearch, target hmm for hmmscan.

label: domains.alimline
labelDescription: Match line indicating identities, conservation +’s, gaps.

label: domains.aliaseq
labelDescription: Aligned target sequence for phmmer and hmmsearch, query for hmmscan.

label: domains.alihmmname
labelDescription: Name of HMM (query sequence for phmmer, alignment for hmmsearch and target hmm for hmmscan).

label: domains.alisqname
labelDescription: Name of target sequence (phmmer, hmmscan) or query sequence(hmmscan).
